rule_metadata.name: BYOVD_kill_av_edr
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'BYOVD_kill_av_edr' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule BYOVD_kill_av_edr
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'BYOVD_kill_av_edr' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "BYOVD_kill_av_edr"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\\\\\\\\\.\\\\aswSP_Avar/ nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = /BYOVD_kill_av_edr\./ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
